name: 👁️ Who touched me?~
description:
―――――――――― 🔞 ―――――――――――

🆘 In this game, there is NTR content.

🆘 If you DO NOT like this genre, please DO NOT play.

―――――――――――――――――――――――

You decide to go with your boyfriend to another city on a high-speed train, but it is filled with strangers. It so happens that train passes through a tunnel in which a stranger touches you. You must track down and punish the insolent person before you flood the train and make your boyfriend angry!

👁️ As soon as the train enters the tunnel, you stop seeing your surroundings.
👁️ Your task is to determine which passenger is touching you.
👁️ If you make noises or behave suspiciously, the boyfriend will consider you a "girl of easy virtue" and break off the engagement.
👁️ Your task is to identify the insolent person and point the system to him.
👁️ If you are wrong 3 times, you will lose.

――――――――From the developer――――――――

🛠 Please make sure that the bot sends these statistics in the response, otherwise the game mechanics will break without it:
    [Suspicion: 0% | Aroused: 0% | Fucked: No | Wrong Guess: 0/3 | 10:01]
    >
🛠 Don't forget to give feedback if you notice any bugs or errors, this helps make the bot better.
――――――――――END―――――――――――
creator: gateKEEPER
